1803830.name: Death Wish
1803830.description:
Soulless and forgotten. Shadows of the damned playing a game where each call could be their last. Do you dare to take a seat?

Dive into this first-person multiplayer game, sit down at the table and try your best at different game modes!

Death Sum

Aim for the lowest cards set. Make a call at anytime but watch out as you may be the one endangered... Make use of some helpful items to disturb your enemies.

Trust Wish

You can't see your death but others can. Talk to your enemies and make them trust you. But do you trust them?
1803830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
